title: Push endpoint SSRF: no validate_outbound_url
description: In push.rs send_push_inner(), the server POSTs to sub.endpoint (line 325) without calling validate_outbound_url(). An authenticated user can register a push subscription with endpoint pointing to internal services (127.0.0.1, 169.254.169.254, 10.x, etc.). The PUSH_CLIENT also does not disable redirects, so even an https:// endpoint could redirect to an internal IP. Unlike delivery.rs (line 254), cards.rs (line 72), and federation.rs (line 202) which all validate outbound URLs, push.rs skips this check entirely. Impact: authenticated SSRF — local user can probe/POST encrypted blobs to arbitrary internal hosts.
